---
title: "Enhancing Accessibility of Communication Sciences and Disorders Research: Open Access and Self-Archiving"
publication: "Audiology Today"
date: "2022-01-15"
year: "2022"
author:
  - name: Laura Gaeta
    orcid: 0000-0001-5493-9636
    affiliations:
      - California State University
  - name: Danika Pfeiffer
    orcid: 0000-0003-1080-4961
    affiliations:
      - Old Dominion University
  - name: Elaine Kearney
    orcid: 0000-0003-4456-1291
    affiliations:
      - University of Queensland
      - Princess Alexandra Hospital
categories:
  - "Other"
  - "Open Science"
links:
  doi:
    show: true
    link: "https://www.audiology.org/news-and-publications/audiology-today/articles/opinion-editorial-enhancing-accessibility-of-communication-sciences-and-disorders-research-open-access-and-self-archiving/"
  pubmed:
    show: false
    link: ""
  postprint:
    show: true
    link: "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1FXWixMTAdDHtti_St3FRE5olSlVbi0df/view"
  preprint:
    show: false
    link: ""
  oa:
    show: false
    link: ""
  materials:
    show: false
    link: ""
  preregistration:
    show: false
    link: ""
aliases:
  - /Research/Publications/Gaeta-et-al-2022/
abstract: "This article provides an overview of two open science practices in communication sciences and disorders. Readers will learn the importance of open access and self-archiving, as well as their benefits and drawbacks."
title-block-banner: true
editor: source
---

\
\

## Important Links

{{< include ../../../_includes/pub-buttons.qmd >}}
